    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="ja">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0">
    <title>文化祭 経費帳</title>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/react/18.2.0/umd/react.production.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/react-dom/18.2.0/umd/react-dom.production.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/babel-standalone/7.23.2/babel.min.js"></script>
    <style>
    * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    body { background: #f2f4f8; font-family: 'Hiragino Sans', 'Meiryo', sans-serif; }
    @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <div id="root"></div>
    <script type="text/babel">
    const { useState, useEffect, useRef } = React;
    const SUPABASE_URL = "https://xoxtdytgwfezhoxokjgy.supabase.co";
    const SUPABASE_KEY = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6InhveHRkeXRnd2ZlemhveG9ramd5Iiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3ODEwODc5MTUsImV4cCI6MjA5NjY2MzkxNX0.NTTURH72M_MD0QQdf8JhZfMeTNSERq8tBxgTjc4qha8";
    const sb = {
    async get(table, query="") {
    const res = await fetch(`${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}${query}`, {
    headers: { apikey: SUPABASE_KEY, Authorization: `Bearer ${SUPABASE_KEY}` }
    });
    return res.json();
    },
    async post(table, body) {
    const res = await fetch(`${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}`, {
    method: "POST",
    headers: { apikey: SUPABASE_KEY, Authorization: `Bearer ${SUPABASE_KEY}`, "Content-Type": "application/json", Prefer: "return=representation" },
    body: JSON.stringify(body)
    });
    return res.json();
    },
    async patch(table, id, body) {
    const res = await fetch(`${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?id=eq.${id}`, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers: { apikey: SUPABASE_KEY, Authorization: `Bearer ${SUPABASE_KEY}`, "Content-Type": "application/json", Prefer: "return=representation" },
    body: JSON.stringify(body)
    });
    return res.json();
    },
    async del(table, id) {
    await fetch(`${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?id=eq.${id}`, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers: { apikey: SUPABASE_KEY, Authorization: `Bearer ${SUPABASE_KEY}` }
    });
    }
    };
    function getParams() {
    const p = new URLSearchParams(window.location.hash.replace("#",""));
    return { eventId: p.get("event")||null, mode: p.get("mode")||"view" };
    }
    function buildURL(eventId, mode) {
    return `${window.location.origin}${window.location.pathname}#event=${eventId}&mode=${mode}`;
    }
    function today() { return new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]; }
    function nowDatetime() {
    const d = new Date();
    return `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0")}-${String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,"0")} ${String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,"0")}:${String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,"0")}`;
    }
    function toBase64(file) {
    return new Promise((res,rej) => { const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=()=>res(r.result.split(",")[1]); r.onerror=rej; r.readAsDataURL(file); });
    }
    async function parseReceiptWithAI(imageBase64) {
    const res = await fetch("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages", {
    method: "POST",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    body: JSON.stringify({
    model: "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", max_tokens: 1000,
    messages: [{ role: "user", content: [
    { type: "image", source: { type: "base64", media_type: "image/jpeg", data: imageBase64 } },
    { type: "text", text: 'このレシート画像から以下をJSONのみで返してください。{"store":"店名","purchase_datetime":"YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM","items":[{"name":"品名","quantity":個数,"unit_price":単価}],"amount":合計金額,"category":"食費か交通費か備品か印刷かその他"}' }
    ]}]
    })
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    const text = data.content?.find(b=>b.type==="text")?.text || "{}";
    try { return JSON.parse(text.replace(/```json|```/g,"").trim()); }
    catch { return { store:"", purchase_datetime:nowDatetime(), items:[], amount:0, category:"その他" }; }
    }
    const S = {
    page: { minHeight:"100vh", background:"#f2f4f8" },
    header: { background:"#1a1a2e", padding:"14px 20px", display:"flex", alignItems:"center", justifyContent:"space-between", position:"sticky", top:0, zIndex:100 },
    logo: { color:"#fff", fontWeight:800, fontSize:16 },
    backBtn: { background:"none", border:"none", color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.7)", cursor:"pointer", fontSize:14 },
    btnGhost: { background:"none", border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", color:"#fff", borderRadius:8, padding:"6px 12px", cursor:"pointer", fontSize:13 },
    closeBtn: { background:"#f2f4f8", border:"none", color:"#555", borderRadius:10, padding:"7px 14px", cursor:"pointer", fontSize:13, fontWeight:600 },
    container: { padding:"20px 16px", maxWidth:480, margin:"0 auto" },
    heroCard: { background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1a2e 0%,#16213e 60%,#0f3460 100%)", padding:"24px 20px" },
    card: { background:"#fff", borderRadius:16, padding:16, boxShadow:"0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)", cursor:"pointer", border:"1px solid #eee", marginBottom:12 },
    secTitle: { fontWeight:700, fontSize:14, color:"#555", marginBottom:8, letterSpacing:0.5, textTransform:"uppercase" },
    pgDark: { height:8, background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.15)", borderRadius:999, marginTop:12, overflow:"hidden" },
    pgFill: { height:"100%", borderRadius:999, transition:"width 0.6s ease" },
    empty: { textAlign:"center", padding:"40px 20px", background:"#fff", borderRadius:16, border:"1px dashed #ddd" },
    fg: { marginBottom:16 },
    label: { display:"block", fontSize:13, fontWeight:600, color:"#555", marginBottom:6 },
    input: { width:"100%", padding:"10px 14px", borderRadius:10, border:"1px solid #dde", fontSize:15, outline:"none", background:"#fff" },
    btnP: { background:"#0f3460", color:"#fff", border:"none", borderRadius:12, padding:"12px 20px", fontWeight:700, fontSize:15, cursor:"pointer" },
    btnS: { background:"#f0f4ff", color:"#0f3460", border:"none", borderRadius:12, padding:"10px 16px", fontWeight:600, fontSize:14, cursor:"pointer" },
    btnD: { background:"#ffe5e5", color:"#e74c3c", border:"none", borderRadius:8, padding:"8px 12px", fontWeight:600, cursor:"pointer" },
    btnDs: { background:"none", color:"#ccc", border:"1px solid #eee", borderRadius:6, padding:"2px 8px", cursor:"pointer", fontSize:13 },
    btnOk: { background:"#e8f8f0", color:"#16a085", border:"none", borderRadius:12, padding:"10px 16px", fontWeight:600, fontSize:14, cursor:"pointer" },
    catChip: { background:"#fff", border:"1px solid #eee", borderRadius:10, padding:"8px 14px", textAlign:"center", minWidth:80 },
    catBadge: { background:"#eef2ff", color:"#4460c0", borderRadius:6, padding:"2px 8px", fontSize:11, fontWeight:600 },
    expRow: { background:"#fff", borderRadius:12, padding:"12px 14px", marginBottom:8, display:"flex", alignItems:"center", boxShadow:"0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)", cursor:"pointer" },
    overlay: { position:"fixed", inset:0, background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.5)", display:"flex", alignItems:"flex-end", justifyContent:"center", zIndex:200 },
    modal: { background:"#fff", borderRadius:"20px 20px 0 0", padding:"24px 20px", width:"100%", maxWidth:480, maxHeight:"85vh", overflowY:"auto" },
    tabs: { display:"flex", gap:8, background:"#f2f4f8", borderRadius:12, padding:4, marginBottom:16 },
    tabA: { flex:1, background:"#fff", border:"none", borderRadius:10, padding:"8px 0", fontWeight:700, fontSize:14, color:"#0f3460", cursor:"pointer", boxShadow:"0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)" },
    tabI: { flex:1, background:"none", border:"none", borderRadius:10, padding:"8px 0", fontWeight:500, fontSize:14, color:"#888", cursor:"pointer" },
    aiNote: { background:"#edfbf3", color:"#16a085", borderRadius:10, padding:"8px 12px", fontSize:13, marginBottom:14, fontWeight:500 },
    spin: { width:36, height:36, border:"3px solid #eee", borderTop:"3px solid #0f3460", borderRadius:"50%", animation:"spin 0.8s linear infinite", margin:"0 auto" },
    handle: { width:36, height:4, background:"#ddd", borderRadius:99, margin:"0 auto 16px" },
    };
    function App() {
    const [params] = useState(getParams);
    const [view, setView] = useState("home");
    const [events, setEvents] = useState([]);
    const [activeEvent, setActiveEvent] = useState(null);
    const [expenses, setExpenses] = useState([]);
    const [members, setMembers] = useState([]);
    const [modal, setModal] = useState(null);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [syncing, setSyncing] = useState(false);
    const pollRef = useRef(null);
    useEffect(() => { loadEvents(); }, []);
    useEffect(() => {
    if (!loading && params.eventId) {
    const ev = events.find(e => e.id === params.eventId);
    if (ev) openEvent(ev);
    }
    }, [loading]);
    async function loadEvents() {
    setLoading(true);
    try { const d = await sb.get("events","?order=created_at.desc"); setEvents(Array.isArray(d)?d:[]); }
    catch { setEvents([]); }
    setLoading(false);
    }
    async function loadExpenses(eid) {
    setSyncing(true);
    try { const d = await sb.get("expenses",`?event_id=eq.${eid}&order=created_at.desc`); setExpenses(Array.isArray(d)?d:[]); }
    catch { setExpenses([]); }
    setSyncing(false);
    }
    async function loadMembers(eid) {
    try { const d = await sb.get("members",`?event_id=eq.${eid}&order=student_id.asc`); setMembers(Array.isArray(d)?d:[]); }
    catch { setMembers([]); }
    }
    function openEvent(ev) {
    setActiveEvent(ev); setView("event");
    loadExpenses(ev.id); loadMembers(ev.id);
    if (pollRef.current) clearInterval(pollRef.current);
    pollRef.current = setInterval(() => loadExpenses(ev.id), 10000);
    }
    async function createEvent(name, totalBudget, categories) {
    const id = `evt_${Date.now()}`;
    const newEv = { id, name, total_budget: Number(totalBudget), categories: categories.map(c=>({name:c})), admin_key:`adm_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,8)}`, created_at:today() };
    const result = await sb.post("events", newEv);
    if (!Array.isArray(result) || result[0]?.code) throw new Error((result[0]?.message)||JSON.stringify(result));
    const updated = await sb.get("events","?order=created_at.desc");
    setEvents(Array.isArray(updated)?updated:[]);
    const created = (Array.isArray(updated)?updated:[]).find(e=>e.id===id)||newEv;
    window.location.hash = `event=${id}&mode=admin`;
    openEvent(created);
    }
    async function updateEventBudget(total, cats) {
    await sb.patch("events", activeEvent.id, { total_budget:Number(total), categories:cats });
    const updated = {...activeEvent, total_budget:Number(total), categories:cats};
    setActiveEvent(updated);
    setEvents(prev=>prev.map(e=>e.id===activeEvent.id?updated:e));
    }
    async function addExpense(expense) {
    const newExp = { id:`exp_${Date.now()}`, event_id:activeEvent.id, store:expense.store||"", purchase_datetime:expense.purchase_datetime||nowDatetime(), items:expense.items||[], amount:Number(expense.amount), category:expense.category||"その他", student_id:expense.student_id||"", student_name:expense.student_name||"", quantity:expense.quantity||1 };
    await sb.post("expenses", newExp);
    await loadExpenses(activeEvent.id);
    }
    async function deleteExpense(expId) { await sb.del("expenses",expId); setExpenses(prev=>prev.filter(e=>e.id!==expId)); }
    async function addMember(member) { await sb.post("members",{id:`mbr_${Date.now()}`,event_id:activeEvent.id,...member}); await loadMembers(activeEvent.id); }
    async function deleteMember(mid) { await sb.del("members",mid); setMembers(prev=>prev.filter(m=>m.id!==mid)); }
    async function importMembersCSV(text) {
    const lines = text.trim().split("\n").filter(l=>l.trim());
    const batch = lines.map(line => { const p=line.split(",").map(s=>s.trim().replace(/^"|"$/g,"")); return p.length>=2&&p[0]&&p[1] ? {id:`mbr_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,5)}`,event_id:activeEvent.id,student_id:p[0],name:p[1]} : null; }).filter(Boolean);
    if (batch.length>0) { await sb.post("members",batch); await loadMembers(activeEvent.id); }
    return batch.length;
    }
    const isAdmin = activeEvent && params.mode==="admin";
    if (loading) return <div style={{...S.page,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexDirection:"column",gap:16}}><div style={S.spin}/><p style={{color:"#888",fontSize:14}}>読み込み中…</p></div>;
    if (view==="home") return <HomeScreen events={events} onCreate={()=>setView("new-event")} onOpen={ev=>{window.location.hash=`event=${ev.id}&mode=admin`;openEvent(ev);}}/>;
    if (view==="new-event") return <NewEventScreen onBack={()=>setView("home")} onCreate={createEvent}/>;
    if (view==="event"&&activeEvent) return <EventScreen event={activeEvent} expenses={expenses} members={members} isAdmin={isAdmin} syncing={syncing} onAddExpense={addExpense} onDeleteExpense={deleteExpense} onUpdateBudget={updateEventBudget} onAddMember={addMember} onDeleteMember={deleteMember} onImportCSV={importMembersCSV} onBack={()=>{setView("home");setActiveEvent(null);window.location.hash="";if(pollRef.current)clearInterval(pollRef.current);}} onShare={()=>setModal("share")} modal={modal} setModal={setModal}/>;
    return null;
    }
    function HomeScreen({events,onCreate,onOpen}) {
    return <div style={S.page}>
    <div style={S.header}><span style={S.logo}>🎪 文化祭 経費帳</span><span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#6bcb77"}}>● LIVE</span></div>
    <div style={S.container}>
    <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:24}}>
    <h2 style={S.secTitle}>イベント一覧</h2>
    <button style={S.btnP} onClick={onCreate}>＋ 新規作成</button>
    </div>
    {events.length===0 ? <div style={S.empty}><div style={{fontSize:48,marginBottom:12}}>🎭</div><p style={{color:"#888",fontSize:14}}>「新規作成」から始めてください。</p></div>
    : events.map(ev=><div key={ev.id} style={S.card} onClick={()=>onOpen(ev)}>
    <div style={{fontWeight:700,fontSize:16,color:"#1a1a2e"}}>{ev.name}</div>
    <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#888",marginTop:4}}>作成日 {ev.created_at} ／ 予算 ¥{(ev.total_budget||0).toLocaleString()}</div>
    </div>)}
    </div>
    </div>;
    }
    const DEFAULT_CATS = ["食費","交通費","備品","印刷","その他"];
    function NewEventScreen({onBack,onCreate}) {
    const [name,setName]=useState("");
    const [budget,setBudget]=useState("");
    const [cats,setCats]=useState([...DEFAULT_CATS]);
    const [newCat,setNewCat]=useState("");
    const [saving,setSaving]=useState(false);
    const [err,setErr]=useState("");
    async function handleCreate() {
    if (!name.trim()) { setErr("イベント名を入力してください"); return; }
    if (!budget) { setErr("予算を入力してください"); return; }
    setErr(""); setSaving(true);
    try { await onCreate(name,budget,cats); }
    catch(e) { setErr("作成失敗："+e.message); setSaving(false); }
    }
    return <div style={S.page}>
    <div style={S.header}>
    <button style={S.backBtn} onClick={onBack}>← 戻る</button>
    <span style={S.logo}>新しいイベント</span>
    <div style={{width:50}}/>
    </div>
    <div style={S.container}>
    {err && <div style={{background:"#ffe5e5",color:"#e74c3c",borderRadius:10,padding:"10px 14px",marginBottom:16,fontSize:13}}>{err}</div>}
    <div style={S.fg}><label style={S.label}>イベント名</label><input style={S.input} value={name} onChange={e=>setName(e.target.value)} placeholder="例：文化祭2025 3年B組"/></div>
    <div style={S.fg}><label style={S.label}>予算合計（円）</label><input style={S.input} type="number" value={budget} onChange={e=>setBudget(e.target.value)} placeholder="例：50000"/></div>
    <div style={S.fg}>
    <label style={S.label}>カテゴリ</label>
    {cats.map((c,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:6}}>
    <input style={{...S.input,flex:1}} value={c} onChange={e=>{const n=[...cats];n[i]=e.target.value;setCats(n);}}/>
    <button style={S.btnD} onClick={()=>setCats(cats.filter((_,j)=>j!==i))}>×</button>
    </div>)}
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:4}}>
    <input style={{...S.input,flex:1}} value={newCat} onChange={e=>setNewCat(e.target.value)} placeholder="カテゴリを追加"/>
    <button style={S.btnS} onClick={()=>{if(newCat.trim()){setCats([...cats,newCat.trim()]);setNewCat("");}}}>追加</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <button style={{...S.btnP,width:"100%",opacity:saving?0.5:1}} onClick={handleCreate} disabled={saving}>
    {saving?"作成中…":"イベントを作成"}
    </button>
    </div>
    </div>;
    }
    function EventScreen({event,expenses,members,isAdmin,syncing,onAddExpense,onDeleteExpense,onUpdateBudget,onAddMember,onDeleteMember,onImportCSV,onBack,onShare,modal,setModal}) {
    const spent=expenses.reduce((s,e)=>s+Number(e.amount),0);
    const budget=event.total_budget||0;
    const remaining=budget-spent;
    const pct=budget>0?Math.min((spent/budget)*100,100):0;
    const cats=Array.isArray(event.categories)?event.categories:[];
    const [activeTab,setActiveTab]=useState("expenses");
    return <div style={S.page}>
    <div style={S.header}>
    <button style={S.backBtn} onClick={onBack}>← 一覧</button>
    <span style={S.logo}>{event.name}</span>
    <button style={S.btnGhost} onClick={onShare}>共有</button>
    </div>
    <div style={S.heroCard}>
    <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,marginBottom:4}}>
    <span style={{fontSize:13,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.7)"}}>残り予算</span>
    <span style={{fontSize:10,color:syncing?"rgba(255,255,255,0.4)":"#6bcb77"}}>{syncing?"同期中…":"● LIVE"}</span>
    </div>
    <div style={{fontSize:44,fontWeight:900,letterSpacing:-2,color:remaining<0?"#ff6b6b":"#fff"}}>¥{remaining.toLocaleString()}</div>
    <div style={S.pgDark}><div style={{...S.pgFill,width:`${pct}%`,background:pct>90?"#ff6b6b":pct>70?"#ffd93d":"#6bcb77"}}/></div>
    <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",fontSize:12,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.6)",marginTop:6}}>
    <span>使用 ¥{spent.toLocaleString()}</span><span>予算 ¥{budget.toLocaleString()}</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style={S.container}>
    {cats.length>0&&<div style={{marginBottom:20}}>
    <div style={S.secTitle}>カテゴリ別</div>
    <div style={{display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:8,marginTop:8}}>
    {cats.map((cat,i)=>{
    const cs=expenses.filter(e=>e.category===cat.name).reduce((s,e)=>s+Number(e.amount),0);
    return <div key={i} style={S.catChip}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:"#555"}}>{cat.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:"#1a1a2e"}}>¥{cs.toLocaleString()}</div></div>;
    })}
    </div>
    </div>}
    <div style={S.tabs}>
    <button style={activeTab==="expenses"?S.tabA:S.tabI} onClick={()=>setActiveTab("expenses")}>💰 経費履歴</button>
    <button style={activeTab==="members"?S.tabA:S.tabI} onClick={()=>setActiveTab("members")}>👥 名簿</button>
    </div>
    {activeTab==="expenses"&&<>
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:16}}>
    <button style={{...S.btnP,flex:1}} onClick={()=>setModal("addExpense")}>📷 経費を追加</button>
    {isAdmin&&<button style={{...S.btnS,flex:1}} onClick={()=>setModal("setBudget")}>⚙️ 予算設定</button>}
    </div>
    <div style={S.secTitle}>経費履歴（{expenses.length}件）</div>
    {expenses.length===0?<div style={S.empty}><p style={{color:"#bbb",fontSize:13}}>まだ経費がありません。</p></div>
    :expenses.map(exp=><ExpenseRow key={exp.id} exp={exp} onDelete={()=>onDeleteExpense(exp.id)}/>)}
    </>}
    {activeTab==="members"&&<MembersTab members={members} isAdmin={isAdmin} onAdd={onAddMember} onDelete={onDeleteMember} onImportCSV={onImportCSV}/>}
    </div>
    {modal==="addExpense"&&<AddExpenseModal categories={cats.map(c=>c.name)} members={members} onClose={()=>setModal(null)} onAdd={async exp=>{await onAddExpense(exp);setModal(null);}}/>}
    {modal==="setBudget"&&isAdmin&&<SetBudgetModal event={event} onClose={()=>setModal(null)} onSave={async(t,c)=>{await onUpdateBudget(t,c);setModal(null);}}/>}
    {modal==="share"&&<ShareModal event={event} onClose={()=>setModal(null)}/>}
    </div>;
    }
    function ExpenseRow({exp,onDelete}) {
    const [open,setOpen]=useState(false);
    const items=Array.isArray(exp.items)?exp.items:[];
    return <div style={S.expRow} onClick={()=>setOpen(v=>!v)}>
    <div style={{flex:1}}>
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
    <span style={S.catBadge}>{exp.category}</span>
    <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:600,color:"#1a1a2e"}}>{exp.store||"支出"}</span>
    {exp.student_name&&<span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#888",background:"#f5f5f5",borderRadius:6,padding:"1px 7px"}}>👤 {exp.student_name}</span>}
    </div>
    <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#aaa",marginTop:3}}>{exp.purchase_datetime||exp.date}</div>
    {open&&items.length>0&&<div style={{marginTop:6,background:"#f8f9fb",borderRadius:8,padding:"6px 10px"}}>
    {items.map((it,i)=><div key={i} style={{fontSize:12,color:"#555",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"2px 0"}}>
    <span>{it.name} × {it.quantity}個</span>
    <span>{it.unit_price?`¥${Number(it.unit_price).toLocaleString()}`:""}</span>
    </div>)}
    </div>}
    </div>
    <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8}}>
    <span style={{fontWeight:800,fontSize:16,color:"#1a1a2e"}}>¥{Number(exp.amount).toLocaleString()}</span>
    <button style={S.btnDs} onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();onDelete();}}>×</button>
    </div>
    </div>;
    }
    function MembersTab({members,isAdmin,onAdd,onDelete,onImportCSV}) {
    const [form,setForm]=useState({student_id:"",name:""});
    const [saving,setSaving]=useState(false);
    const [importing,setImporting]=useState(false);
    const fileRef=useRef();
    async function handleCSV(file) {
    setImporting(true);
    const text=await file.text();
    const count=await onImportCSV(text);
    alert(`${count}件インポートしました`);
    setImporting(false);
    }
    return <div>
    {isAdmin&&<div style={{marginBottom:16}}>
    <div style={S.secTitle}>名簿を追加</div>
    <div style={{background:"#f7f8fa",borderRadius:12,padding:14,marginBottom:12}}>
    <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:6}}>📂 CSVから一括登録</div>
    <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#888",marginBottom:8}}>形式：学籍番号,氏名（1行1人）<br/>例： 1001,山田太郎</div>
    <input type="file" accept=".csv,text/csv" ref={fileRef} style={{display:"none"}} onChange={e=>e.target.files[0]&&handleCSV(e.target.files[0])}/>
    <button style={{...S.btnS,width:"100%"}} onClick={()=>fileRef.current.click()} disabled={importing}>{importing?"インポート中…":"CSVをアップロード"}</button>
    </div>
    <div style={{background:"#f7f8fa",borderRadius:12,padding:14,marginBottom:16}}>
    <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:8}}>✏️ 手動で1人追加</div>
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:8}}>
    <div style={{flex:1}}><label style={S.label}>学籍番号</label><input style={S.input} value={form.student_id} onChange={e=>setForm({...form,student_id:e.target.value.replace(/\D/g,"")})} placeholder="例：1001" inputMode="numeric"/></div>
    <div style={{flex:2}}><label style={S.label}>氏名</label><input style={S.input} value={form.name} onChange={e=>setForm({...form,name:e.target.value})} placeholder="例：山田太郎"/></div>
    </div>
    <button style={{...S.btnP,width:"100%",opacity:(!form.student_id||!form.name||saving)?0.5:1}} disabled={!form.student_id||!form.name||saving}
    onClick={async()=>{setSaving(true);await onAdd(form);setForm({student_id:"",name:""});setSaving(false);}}>
    {saving?"追加中…":"追加"}
    </button>
    </div>
    </div>}
    <div style={S.secTitle}>名簿一覧（{members.length}人）</div>
    {members.length===0?<div style={S.empty}><p style={{color:"#bbb",fontSize:13}}>名簿がまだ登録されていません。</p></div>
    :members.map(m=><div key={m.id} style={{...S.expRow,cursor:"default"}}>
    <div style={{flex:1}}><span style={{fontWeight:700,color:"#1a1a2e",fontSize:14}}>{m.name}</span><span style={{fontSize:12,color:"#888",marginLeft:10}}>#{m.student_id}</span></div>
    {isAdmin&&<button style={S.btnDs} onClick={()=>onDelete(m.id)}>×</button>}
    </div>)}
    </div>;
    }
    function AddExpenseModal({categories,members,onClose,onAdd}) {
    const [tab,setTab]=useState("receipt");
    const [aiLoading,setAiLoading]=useState(false);
    const [saving,setSaving]=useState(false);
    const [parsed,setParsed]=useState(null);
    const [sid,setSid]=useState("");
    const [rname,setRname]=useState("");
    const [form,setForm]=useState({store:"",purchase_datetime:nowDatetime(),amount:"",category:categories[0]||"その他",items:[{name:"",quantity:1,unit_price:""}]});
    const fileRef=useRef();
    function lookup(v) { const m=members.find(m=>m.student_id===v); setRname(m?m.name:v?"（名簿に見つかりません）":""); }
    async function handleImage(file) {
    setAiLoading(true);
    try {
    const b64=await toBase64(file);
    const r=await parseReceiptWithAI(b64);
    const m={store:r.store||"",purchase_datetime:r.purchase_datetime||nowDatetime(),amount:r.amount||"",category:categories.includes(r.category)?r.category:(categories[0]||"その他"),items:r.items&&r.items.length>0?r.items.map(it=>({name:it.name||"",quantity:it.quantity||1,unit_price:it.unit_price||""})):[{name:"",quantity:1,unit_price:""}]};
    setParsed(m); setForm(m); setTab("manual");
    } catch { alert("読み取り失敗。手動で入力してください。"); setTab("manual"); }
    setAiLoading(false);
    }
    function updItem(i,f,v){const n=[...form.items];n[i]={...n[i],[f]:v};setForm({...form,items:n});}
    async function submit() {
    if (!form.amount){alert("金額を入力してください");return;}
    setSaving(true);
    const m=members.find(m=>m.student_id===sid);
    await onAdd({...form,amount:Number(form.amount),student_id:sid,student_name:m?m.name:sid,items:form.items.filter(it=>it.name)});
    setSaving(false);
    }
    return <div style={S.overlay} onClick={onClose}>
    <div style={S.modal} onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}>
    <div style={S.handle}/>
    <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:16}}>
    <h3 style={{margin:0,fontSize:17}}>経費を追加</h3>
    <button style={S.closeBtn} onClick={onClose}>✕ 閉じる</button>
    </div>
    <div style={S.tabs}>
    <button style={tab==="receipt"?S.tabA:S.tabI} onClick={()=>setTab("receipt")}>📷 レシート</button>
    <button style={tab==="manual"?S.tabA:S.tabI} onClick={()=>setTab("manual")}>✏️ 手動入力</button>
    </div>
    {tab==="receipt"&&<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"24px 0"}}>
    {aiLoading?<div><div style={S.spin}/><p style={{color:"#888",fontSize:13,marginTop:12}}>AIが読み取り中…</p></div>:<>
    <div style={{fontSize:48,marginBottom:12}}>🧾</div>
    <p style={{color:"#888",fontSize:13,marginBottom:16}}>レシートを撮影・選択するとAIが<br/>日時・品名・個数・金額を自動入力</p>
    <input type="file" accept="image/*" capture="environment" ref={fileRef} style={{display:"none"}} onChange={e=>e.target.files[0]&&handleImage(e.target.files[0])}/>
    <button style={{...S.btnP,display:"block",width:"100%",marginBottom:10}} onClick={()=>fileRef.current.click()}>📷 レシートを撮影・選択</button>
    <button style={{...S.btnS,display:"block",width:"100%"}} onClick={()=>setTab("manual")}>✏️ 手動で入力する</button>
    </>}
    </div>}
    {tab==="manual"&&<div>
    {parsed&&<div style={S.aiNote}>✨ AIが自動入力しました。確認・修正してください。</div>}
    <div style={S.fg}><label style={S.label}>学籍番号 <span style={{color:"#aaa",fontWeight:400}}>（半角数字）</span></label>
    <input style={S.input} value={sid} inputMode="numeric" onChange={e=>{const v=e.target.value.replace(/\D/g,"");setSid(v);lookup(v);}} placeholder="例：1001"/>
    {rname&&<div style={{fontSize:12,marginTop:4,color:rname.includes("見つかりません")?"#e74c3c":"#16a085",fontWeight:600}}>👤 {rname}</div>}
    </div>
    <div style={S.fg}><label style={S.label}>購入日時</label><input style={S.input} type="datetime-local" value={(form.purchase_datetime||"").replace(" ","T")} onChange={e=>setForm({...form,purchase_datetime:e.target.value.replace("T"," ")})}/></div>
    <div style={S.fg}><label style={S.label}>店名</label><input style={S.input} value={form.store} onChange={e=>setForm({...form,store:e.target.value})} placeholder="例：コンビニ"/></div>
    <div style={S.fg}>
    <label style={S.label}>購入品目</label>
    {form.items.map((item,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:6,marginBottom:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
    <input style={{...S.input,flex:3}} value={item.name} onChange={e=>updItem(i,"name",e.target.value)} placeholder="品名"/>
    <input style={{...S.input,flex:1,textAlign:"center"}} type="number" value={item.quantity} onChange={e=>updItem(i,"quantity",e.target.value)} placeholder="個数" min="1"/>
    <input style={{...S.input,flex:2}} type="number" value={item.unit_price} onChange={e=>updItem(i,"unit_price",e.target.value)} placeholder="単価"/>
    {form.items.length>1&&<button style={S.btnDs} onClick={()=>setForm({...form,items:form.items.filter((_,j)=>j!==i)})}>×</button>}
    </div>)}
    <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#aaa",marginBottom:4}}>品名 ／ 個数 ／ 単価（円）</div>
    <button style={{...S.btnS,fontSize:12,padding:"6px 12px"}} onClick={()=>setForm({...form,items:[...form.items,{name:"",quantity:1,unit_price:""}]})}>＋ 品目を追加</button>
    </div>
    <div style={S.fg}><label style={S.label}>合計金額（円）*</label><input style={{...S.input,fontSize:18,fontWeight:700}} type="number" value={form.amount} onChange={e=>setForm({...form,amount:e.target.value})} placeholder="例：1500"/></div>
    <div style={S.fg}><label style={S.label}>カテゴリ</label>
    <select style={S.input} value={form.category} onChange={e=>setForm({...form,category:e.target.value})}>
    {categories.map(c=><option key={c}>{c}</option>)}
    </select>
    </div>
    <button style={{...S.btnP,width:"100%",opacity:saving?0.6:1}} disabled={saving} onClick={submit}>{saving?"追加中…":"追加する"}</button>
    </div>}
    </div>
    </div>;
    }
    function SetBudgetModal({event,onClose,onSave}) {
    const [total,setTotal]=useState(String(event.total_budget||0));
    const [cats,setCats]=useState(Array.isArray(event.categories)?event.categories.map(c=>({...c})):[]);
    const [saving,setSaving]=useState(false);
    return <div style={S.overlay} onClick={onClose}>
    <div style={S.modal} onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}>
    <div style={S.handle}/>
    <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:16}}>
    <h3 style={{margin:0,fontSize:17}}>予算設定（管理者）</h3>
    <button style={S.closeBtn} onClick={onClose}>✕ 閉じる</button>
    </div>
    <div style={S.fg}><label style={S.label}>予算合計（円）</label><input style={S.input} type="number" value={total} onChange={e=>setTotal(e.target.value)}/></div>
    <div style={S.fg}>
    <label style={S.label}>カテゴリ</label>
    {cats.map((c,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
    <input style={{...S.input,flex:1}} value={c.name} onChange={e=>{const n=[...cats];n[i]={...n[i],name:e.target.value};setCats(n);}}/>
    <button style={S.btnD} onClick={()=>setCats(cats.filter((_,j)=>j!==i))}>×</button>
    </div>)}
    <button style={{...S.btnS,marginTop:4}} onClick={()=>setCats([...cats,{name:"新カテゴリ"}])}>＋ 追加</button>
    </div>
    <button style={{...S.btnP,width:"100%",opacity:saving?0.6:1}} disabled={saving} onClick={async()=>{setSaving(true);await onSave(Number(total),cats);setSaving(false);}}>
    {saving?"保存中…":"保存する"}
    </button>
    </div>
    </div>;
    }
    function ShareModal({event,onClose}) {
    const adminURL=buildURL(event.id,"admin");
    const memberURL=buildURL(event.id,"member");
    const [copied,setCopied]=useState(null);
    function copy(url,type){navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(()=>{setCopied(type);setTimeout(()=>setCopied(null),2000);});}
    return <div style={S.overlay} onClick={onClose}>
    <div style={S.modal} onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}>
    <div style={S.handle}/>
    <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:16}}>
    <h3 style={{margin:0,fontSize:17}}>共有リンク</h3>
    <button style={S.closeBtn} onClick={onClose}>✕ 閉じる</button>
    </div>
    {[{label:"👑 管理者リンク",desc:"予算設定・名簿管理・削除が可能",url:adminURL,type:"admin"},{label:"✏️ メンバーリンク",desc:"経費追加のみ可能。参加者全員に共有",url:memberURL,type:"member"}].map(({label,desc,url,type})=>
    <div key={type} style={{background:"#f7f8fa",borderRadius:12,padding:14,marginBottom:12}}>
    <div style={{fontWeight:700,fontSize:14,marginBottom:4}}>{label}</div>
    <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#888",marginBottom:8}}>{desc}</div>
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
    <input style={{...S.input,flex:1,fontSize:11,color:"#555"}} readOnly value={url}/>
    <button style={copied===type?S.btnOk:S.btnS} onClick={()=>copy(url,type)}>{copied===type?"✓ コピー済み":"コピー"}</button>
    </div>
    </div>)}
    <div style={{background:"#edfbf3",borderRadius:10,padding:"10px 14px",fontSize:12,color:"#16a085"}}>
    ✓ Supabaseでリアルタイム同期中。どのデバイスでも同じデータが見られます。
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>;
    }
    ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById("root")).render(<App/>);
    </script>
    </body>
    </html>

    Footer

    You can’t perform that action at this time.
